title: A SIMPLE WISDOM TOOTH EXTRACTION
author: Rustamov, Otamurod
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: It was found that 20% of healthy people have a pathology associated with eruption of wisdom teeth. Infectious and inflammatory processes developing during this period are especially dangerous. They tend to spread to the soft tissues of the maxillofacial region, neck, as well as to penetrate with blood flow into the brain.
steps_raw: It was found that 20% of healthy people have a pathology associated with eruption of wisdom teeth. Infectious and inflammatory processes developing during this period are especially dangerous. They tend to spread to the soft tissues of the maxillofacial region, neck, as well as to penetrate with blood flow into the brain.
